use_cases: Displaying additional context or help text on hover
Showing keyboard shortcuts or feature explanations
Providing tooltips for form field labels and icons
Revealing truncated text or overflow content
Quick information display for interactive elements
ai_summary: A lightweight tooltip component built on Radix UI primitives that displays contextual information on hover with smooth fade and zoom animations. Features customizable positioning, optional arrow indicator, and clean popover styling with subtle slide-in effects for different positions.
